ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number of the airline */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline operating the flight */,
  "from_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the departure airport */,
  "to_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrival airport */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed) */,
  "gate" TEXT /* Gate number assigned for boarding */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "flight_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "flight_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight in miles */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_from_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_to_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the airline */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code for the airport */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the flight status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boarding_passes" (
  "boarding_pass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boarding pass */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated flight */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time when boarding begins */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "boarding_group" TEXT /* Boarding group of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boarding_pass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boarding_passes_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boarding_passes_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gate_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gate assignment */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight assigned to the gate */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number assigned to the flight */,
  "assigned_time" TEXT /* Time when the gate was assigned */,
  "gate_name" TEXT /* Name of the gate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gate_assignments_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delayed flight */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "delay_description" TEXT /* Description of the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cancelled flight */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_time" TEXT /* Time when the flight was cancelled */,
  "cancellation_description" TEXT /* Description of the cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_cancellations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "boarding_pass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boarding pass that the notification relates to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read by the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_boarding_pass_id FOREIGN KEY ("boarding_pass_id") REFERENCES boarding_passes ("boarding_pass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight that follows the route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight that follows the schedule */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the schedule */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_aircrafts" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight that is assigned to the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft that is assigned to the flight */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_aircrafts_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_aircrafts_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircrafts ("aircraft_id")
)
